ai_features_disclosed.description: Reads inbound customer messages and routes them to the appropriate human agent queue (billing, technical, escalation). Does not respond to the customer directly; the human agent handles all customer-facing communication.
Flags incoming messages where the model detects elevated frustration, distress, or potential complaint escalation, surfaces them in a priority queue for senior agents.
Generates suggested response drafts based on the customer message and past resolution patterns. The human agent reviews, edits, or rejects each draft before sending.

training_data_sources: Vendor's anonymized historical customer service transcripts (with customer consent per DPA)

categories: Message content (which may incidentally include PII)
pii_processing_claims.handling_notes: Customer-provided PII in message content is processed in real time and not retained for model fine-tuning. Account numbers are masked before reaching the model context. Conversation transcripts are retained for 90 days for quality assurance and then purged.

data_residency.conditions: Customer data stored in Canadian region (CA-CENTRAL-1). Model inference via Anthropic API goes through US data centers; data processing addendum confirms no training use and no cross-border data retention beyond inference window.

vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.name: Amazon Web Services (CA-CENTRAL-1)
vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.role: Customer data storage and application hosting
